stemHtml:
In order to overcome an overload of work during the flight, it is necessary to:

1. know how to use one’s own reserve of resources in order to ease the burden on the crew.
2. divide up tasks among the crew.
3. ensure that the long-term memory is used as much as possible as short term memory will add to the stress.
4. drop certain tasks and stick to high-level priorities.

The correct statements is(are);
